Script Text: Well hey there, sugar! Come on in and pull up a chair![Short Pause] If you're lookin' for a bingo night that's as sweet as a slice of homemade pecan pie, you're right where you belong![pause] I'm Auntie Belle, and I'm here to sprinkle a little Southern hospitality all over your game tonight![Short Pause] We don't need to rush... I take my time callin' these numbers so everybody can enjoy the evening and mark their cards in peace![Short Pause] Let's play some good ol' fashioned bingo... nice and easy... the Southern way!"

[excited] Well now, gather 'round![Short Pause]  It's about that time![Short Pause] ] We're switchin' gears in the next game from Music to a good ol' fashioned, standard game of Bingo... presented by AMI Entertainment![Short Pause]  Just you, me, and the numbers![Short Pause] If you ain't got a card yet, go ahead and wave down your host! [Short Pause]  And before we get to callin', make sure you ask 'em what the winning pattern is tonight! [Short Pause]  Alright... let's see who the lucky ones are!
[warmly] Five numbers down![pause] We're just gettin' the dust off the tires![pause] If you just walked in, it ain't too late![pause] Grab your host and get a card!
[warmly] Fifteen numbers called![pause] Y'all are lookin' mighty focused out there![pause] Keep your eyes on the board!
[warmly] Twenty-five numbers in the bucket![pause] Somebody out there's gotta be gettin' close![pause] Don't be shy when you hit it... let us hear ya!
[chuckling] Thirty-five numbers in the books![pause] We're about halfway down the trail![pause] Anybody sweatin' yet?!
[playful] Fifty-five numbers![pause] The air is gettin' a little thin in here![pause] Double check those cards, folks!

[playful] Well, that's seventy-five numbers![pause] The bucket is empty![pause] If nobody hollered bingo, we might need to check your hearing![pause] Thanks for playin' with us tonight, and a big tip of the hat to AMI Entertainment![pause] Stick around, we'll have more fun comin' up!
